message:
feat(fastmcp): add protocol types and auth testing fixtures

Expand the FastMCP framework with comprehensive protocol types and testing support:

Protocol types (types.rs):
- Full MCP protocol type definitions
- Request/response envelopes
- Tool, resource, and prompt types
- Error codes and structured errors
- Capability negotiation types
- Progress and cancellation support
- Pagination cursors
- Sampling request/response types

Testing fixtures:
- auth.rs: Token generators for testing authentication
  - Static bearer tokens
  - JWT-like tokens (test-only, not cryptographically secure)
  - API key generation
  - Session token helpers
- mod.rs: Module exports for testing utilities

These additions enable comprehensive testing of MCP servers and clients
without requiring external dependencies or network access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
